inspirations.scope: knowledge layering, design and evidence gates, branch isolation
upstream posting gates, restart state, runtime review workflow

manage-upstream-contribution.scenario: Rejected OpenSandbox #1262 after finding the active closing PR despite an unassigned issue

route-project-work.scenario: Resolved Karmada and AgentCube learning context through exact-ref overlays without switching source branches
